\tzpentry{ID3677}{Planck System Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3677 introduces Planck System Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\mathcal{N}_{\text{crit}} \sim (m_{\text{Planck}}/m_{\text{system}})^{1/2}$
\]
